id: the engineer who can fix bugs
intention: 会修 bug 的工程师
naturalChunk: the engineer who can fix bugs
avoidSaying: the engineer who can fixes bugs
the engineer who can fixing bugs
sentencePatterns: We need an engineer who can ...
realLifeExamples: We need an engineer who can fix bugs quickly.
usageNotes: After can, use the base verb: can fix, not can fixes.
productionPrompts: 用 We need an engineer who can ... 写一句关于团队招聘或协作的英文。
